notes: Primary key; decimal(10,0) has no fractional part and max value 9,999,999,999 is well within INT64 range; NOT NULL enforced
VARCHAR(50) maps to BigQuery STRING; length constraint is not enforced at the BigQuery layer; NOT NULL enforced
VARCHAR(50) maps to BigQuery STRING; NOT NULL enforced
VARCHAR(100) maps to BigQuery STRING; pre-load schema validation should confirm email uniqueness if a business uniqueness rule exists; NOT NULL enforced
Nullable VARCHAR(20); NULL values are preserved; null constraint violation logging applies per acceptance criteria
MySQL DATE maps directly to BigQuery DATE; designated MONTH-granularity partition column to optimise analytical range scans by hire cohort and reduce query cost; NOT NULL enforced
VARCHAR(20) maps to BigQuery STRING; third clustering column supporting job-role-level analytics and filtering; NOT NULL enforced
decimal(8,2) maps to BigQuery NUMERIC which supports up to 29 digits of precision and 9 of scale; two-decimal precision is fully preserved; NOT NULL enforced
Nullable decimal(4,2); NULL values preserved; BigQuery NUMERIC retains two-decimal fractional precision; null constraint violations to be logged pre-load
Nullable self-referencing FK to employee_id; NULL indicates a top-level manager with no parent; decimal(10,0) safely maps to INT64
Nullable decimal(4,0) maps to INT64; second clustering column enabling efficient department-level query pruning; NULL values preserved

VARCHAR(10) maps to BigQuery STRING; designated first (highest-priority) clustering column due to expected high filter frequency in analytics predicates (e.g. WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'); NOT NULL enforced
MySQL TIMESTAMP maps to BigQuery TIMESTAMP; used as secondary delta tracking signal and full-load watermark anchor; NOT NULL enforced

Nullable MySQL TIMESTAMP; primary delta column for incremental load watermark strategy (MAX(updated_date) tracks high-water mark); NULL on records never updated after initial insert; null handling must be accounted for in delta SQL to avoid missing newly inserted rows
